creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-09-13 12:25:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    databases            Makefile 
  Added files:
    databases/sqlite-ext-inet Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    databases/sqlite-ext-inet/files patch-ipv4-ext.c 
  Log:
  This library will provide the ipv4 ISINNET, IP2INT, INT2IP,
  NETFROM, NETLENGTH, NETMASKLENGTH functions in SQL queries.
  
  WWW: http://mobigroup.ru/files/sqlite-ext/inet/
  
  PR:             ports/137295
  Submitted by:   Pavel Volkov <pol at iib.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.797     +1 -0      ports/databases/Makefile
  1.1       +49 -0     ports/databases/sqlite-ext-inet/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/databases/sqlite-ext-inet/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/databases/sqlite-ext-inet/files/patch-ipv4-ext.c (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/databases/sqlite-ext-inet/pkg-descr (new)
